info.name: Rentopus Call Scheduler
info.description: Postman collection for Rentopus Call Scheduler APIs featuring Schedule Call, Call Resolution, and Lead List bulk queueing.

request.description: Validates the lead details, triggers telephony integration, and pushes the call task to the BullMQ priority queue.
Receives the call transcript, utilizes Gemini AI to parse structured resolution insights, updates the CRM with sentiment/status, and queues standard follow-up if callback was requested.
Fetches today's active lead list from Rentopus CRM and automatically processes them into staggered call queues in BullMQ.
